title: Dave's CashAI: Is This Underwriting Engine a Fintech Game-Changer?
text:
CashAI represents Dave's proprietary underwriting engine that leverages real-time credit risk identification via fully automated bank account transaction data analysis. This automated approach directly challenges conventional lending models that operate more slowly.

Business Impact Metrics:
The Q1 2025 results demonstrate CashAI's effectiveness:
- Profitability surge: Adjusted EBITDA increased 235% year-over-year
- Margin expansion: Non-GAAP variable profit rose 67% with variable margins reaching 77%
- Loan originations: ExtraCash originations climbed 46% to over $1.5 billion
- Credit quality: 28-day delinquency improved 33 basis points (18% year-over-year), while provision for credit losses dropped to 0.69% from 0.94%

Competitive Positioning:
The engine enables Dave to profitably underwrite larger numbers of Dave members for higher ExtraCash approval amounts despite seasonal headwinds. As training data expands, the system should identify better credit risks, creating a defensible moat against competitors relying on slower underwriting methods.

Stock Performance:
Dave's stock surged 456% over the past year, significantly outpacing CoreCard (79.1%) and Loop Industries (-33.1%). The company carries a Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy) rating with consensus earnings estimates up 33.8% in 30 days.
